name: Women's Plastic Oval Sunglasses - A New Day™ Black: UV Protection, Impact-Resistant, Recycled Frame
description:
Bring a sleek update to your sunglasses collection with the Plastic Oval Sunglasses from A New Day™. Designed in an oval shape, these black sunglasses have UV protection lenses to help keep your eyes shielded from harmful sun rays. These impact-resistant sunglasses are made with a plastic frame for a lightweight feel, and they fit narrow faces.

A New Day™: Style that goes wherever you do.
